variables.notes: Candidate list does not contain a valid total equity / parent equity row. From the full Balance Sheet preview, 'Right-of-use assets Shares in associates and joint ventures' appears to equal total equity minus non-controlling interests in the shown years, so it is the best apparent proxy for equity attributable to owners.
